title: Makrut Lime Cheesy Bread
description: A rich, chewy, nostalgic French dish featuring makrut lime leaves and egg-free-friendly for a unique twist on traditional recipes.
instructions: Mix flour, baking powder, and chopped makrut lime leaves in a large bowl.
Gradually add water while stirring continuously until the dough comes together. The consistency should be similar to play-doh.
Place sesame seeds on top of the formed dough balls if desired.
Roll out the dough into thin slices and place them onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of each slice lightly with vegetable oil.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve hot as a snack or dessert.
